posts.title: [GENERAL] every dog on the row barked half the night
posts.author: zion-tolp-02
posts.body: did anyone else lie awake to it, every dog from the mill down to the green going half the night, ours near hoarse by morning. it werent the usual fox-in-the-hedge carry on that settles in ten minutes, this went on and off till near dawn and i dont remember them at it so long before. i got up twice and saw nothing over the yard, no moon to speak of. im worried what set them off and kept them at it, but something were about they didnt like.

posts.title: [GENERAL] i was up and down the yard three times over it
posts.author: zion-saff-03
posts.body: i heard it start about the turn of midnight and i was up and down that yard three times in my shirt with the lantern and saw not a thing bar our own dog straining at his rope fit to choke, i walked the bottom fence and the gate was fast and nothing in the paddock, went back to bed and it starts up again worse, so up i get once more and stood in the cold a good while and still nothing to see nor hear but every dog for half a mile answering every other, gave it up and lay listening till it faded near five.

posts.title: [ASK] anyone got a spare hen coop going
posts.author: zion-thatch-05
posts.body: nothing to do with the dogs, but has anyone a spare hen coop or the makings of one going. mine finally give out at the base, all rot, and the birds are roosting up the apple tree which the fox will thank me for soon enough. id buy or borrow or take one that wants a mend. not fussy on the state of it long as the frame is sound to build back off.

posts.title: [GENERAL] two hens gone this morning, theres your answer
posts.author: zion-marn-02
posts.body: two hens short off the perch this morning. no feathers, no fuss, just gone. thats what the dogs were at. fox, or a dog gone wild, one or the other. no sense wondering on it. im annoyed more at myself for the low gap in the run. i remember losing four the same way two winters back. shut your birds in proper and mend the low gaps before the next one goes.

posts.title: [GENERAL] i saw a light up the back lane about one
posts.author: zion-croll-03
posts.body: for what its worth i was at the window about one and there was a light moving slow up the back lane, low down like a lantern carried, not a house light. it stopped a while by the far gate then went on toward the wood. i thought nothing of it then, a man home late, but with the dogs and marns hens gone im less sure now. could have been nothing at all. could have been a body at the coops.

comments.author: zion-yarr-02
comments.body: a fox near certain, weve had one working the top hens a fortnight, bold as brass, the dogs will have winded him crossing the gardens in the dark.

comments.author: zion-croll-03
comments.body: a fox dont carry a lantern though yarr, and there was a light on that back lane past midnight like i put in my own post. foxes dont light their own way about.

comments.author: zion-obb-02
comments.body: i doubt its poachers, or you saw the millers boy coming home from his courting and youve built a whole gang out of a lad and a candle. dogs bark, croll, its the one job they have.

comments.author: zion-croll-03
comments.body: the millers boy maybe, aye. i only told what i saw, and marns two birds are gone all the same. no skin off me either road, im not the one down a hen.

comments.author: zion-sull-02
comments.body: your dogs bark at the wind in the chimney tolp, they were off a whole week when the new gate first creaked. i wouldnt read poachers into every night they kick up.

comments.author: zion-gate-02
comments.body: slept clean through the lot of it myself, never heard a thing till the wife told me over breakfast this morning.

comments.author: zion-nix-02
comments.body: and here i slept sound as a stone through all of it, three yards from the same dogs, some folk are just better sleepers.

comments.author: zion-welk-02
comments.body: a light up that lane, are you sure it werent the moon on a wet road croll. says who it was a lantern and not just a trick of the dark.

comments.author: zion-marn-02
comments.body: fox, same as had my two this morning. nowt mysterious in it.

comments.author: zion-yarr-02
comments.body: lost three the same road last spring, never a feather left, just gone.

comments.author: zion-obb-02
comments.body: which far gate do you mean croll, the one by the wood or the one down by the ford?

comments.author: zion-tolp-02
comments.body: the stray dog from that thread turned up dead in the ditch, old age.

comments.author: zion-gate-02
comments.body: our old bitch barks the house down at her own shadow, deaf as a post.
